targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1
    CONVERT(varchar(8), DATA_HORA, 3) + ' ' +
    LEFT(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATA_HORA, 108),5)
    + CHAR(10) +
    CASE 
        WHEN EQUIPAMENTO = 'LAB' THEN 'SPECTROLAB'
        WHEN EQUIPAMENTO = 'MAX' THEN 'SPECTROMAX'
        ELSE EQUIPAMENTO
    END AS [ÚLTIMA ANÁLISE]
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    PRODUTO
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC

SELECT TOP 1
    MATERIAL
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC

SELECT TOP 1
    CAST(PANELA AS varchar(20)) + CHAR(10) AS PANELA
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    [TEMP. LIB. VAZAMENTO] AS Temperatura
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    [CONSUMO LIGA] AS RENDIMENTO
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    CONVERT(varchar(8), DATA_HORA, 3) + ' ' +
    LEFT(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATA_HORA, 108),5)
    + CHAR(10) +
    CASE 
        WHEN EQUIPAMENTO = 'LAB' THEN 'SPECTROLAB'
        WHEN EQUIPAMENTO = 'MAX' THEN 'SPECTROMAX'
        ELSE EQUIPAMENTO
    END AS [ÚLTIMA ANÁLISE]
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    PRODUTO
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC

SELECT TOP 1
    MATERIAL
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC

SELECT TOP 1
    CAST(PANELA AS varchar(20)) + CHAR(10) AS PANELA
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    [TEMP. LIB. VAZAMENTO] AS Temperatura
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC;

SELECT TOP 1
    [CONSUMO LIGA] AS RENDIMENTO
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
ORDER BY SEQUENCIA DESC;

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'Mg' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(Mg,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN Mg BETWEEN Mg_MIN AND Mg_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN Mg BETWEEN Mg_MIN - ((Mg_MAX-Mg_MIN)*0.1)
            AND Mg_MAX + ((Mg_MAX-Mg_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'C' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(C,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN C BETWEEN C_MIN AND C_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN C BETWEEN C_MIN - ((C_MAX-C_MIN)*0.1)
           AND C_MAX + ((C_MAX-C_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'Cueq' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(Cueq,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN Cueq BETWEEN Cueq_MIN AND Cueq_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN Cueq BETWEEN Cueq_MIN - ((Cueq_MAX-Cueq_MIN)*0.1)
              AND Cueq_MAX + ((Cueq_MAX-Cueq_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

    SELECT TOP 1 *

    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

'Si' elemento,

CASE
 WHEN Si BETWEEN Si_MIN AND Si_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN Si BETWEEN Si_MIN - ((Si_MAX-Si_MIN)*0.1)
            AND Si_MAX + ((Si_MAX-Si_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC

'P' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(P,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN P BETWEEN P_MIN AND P_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN P BETWEEN P_MIN - ((P_MAX-P_MIN)*0.1)

 THEN 'LIMITE'

END status

    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'

CASE

options.content: Mg (Magnésio)

targets.rawSql:
WITH ultimas AS (
    SELECT
        SEQUENCIA_ID,
        CAST(Mg AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS valor,
        Mg_min,
        Mg_max,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
      AND Mg IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID ASC) AS eixo_x,
    Mg_max AS UCL,
    Mg_min AS LCL,
    Mg_min + ((Mg_max - Mg_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_INF,
    Mg_max - ((Mg_max - Mg_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_SUP,
    CAST(ROUND(valor,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor
FROM ultimas
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY eixo_x;

WITH ultimas AS (
    SELECT
        SEQUENCIA_ID,
        CAST(Mg AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS valor,
        Mg_min,
        Mg_max,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
      AND Mg IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID ASC) AS eixo_x,
    Mg_max AS UCL,
    Mg_min AS LCL,
    Mg_min + ((Mg_max - Mg_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_INF,
    Mg_max - ((Mg_max - Mg_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_SUP,
    CAST(ROUND(valor,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor
FROM ultimas
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY eixo_x;

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'Cu' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(Cu,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE

 WHEN Cu BETWEEN Cu_MIN - ((Cu_MAX-Cu_MIN)*0.1)
            AND Cu_MAX + ((Cu_MAX-Cu_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

            AND Al_MAX + ((Al_MAX-Al_MIN)*0.1)

SELECT
    CONVERT(varchar(10), DATA_HORA, 103) + ' ' +
    LEFT(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATA_HORA, 108),5)
    AS [BRUKER / LECO]
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
  AND [C COMB] IS NOT NULL
  AND SEQUENCIA = (
        SELECT MAX(SEQUENCIA)
        FROM dbo.bi_espectro
        WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
          AND [C COMB] IS NOT NULL
  );

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'Cu' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(Cu,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN Cu BETWEEN Cu_MIN AND Cu_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN Cu BETWEEN Cu_MIN - ((Cu_MAX-Cu_MIN)*0.1)
            AND Cu_MAX + ((Cu_MAX-Cu_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'Mn' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(Mn,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN Mn BETWEEN Mn_MIN AND Mn_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN Mn BETWEEN Mn_MIN - ((Mn_MAX-Mn_MIN)*0.1)
            AND Mn_MAX + ((Mn_MAX-Mn_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'Al' elemento,
CAST(ROUND(Al,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) valor,

CASE
 WHEN Al BETWEEN Al_MIN AND Al_MAX THEN 'OK'
 WHEN Al BETWEEN Al_MIN - ((Al_MAX-Al_MIN)*0.1)
            AND Al_MAX + ((Al_MAX-Al_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'
 ELSE 'FORA'
END status

FROM ultima

SELECT
    CONVERT(varchar(10), DATA_HORA, 103) + ' ' +
    LEFT(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATA_HORA, 108),5)
    AS [BRUKER / LECO]
FROM dbo.bi_espectro
WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
  AND [C COMB] IS NOT NULL
  AND SEQUENCIA = (
        SELECT MAX(SEQUENCIA)
        FROM dbo.bi_espectro
        WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
          AND [C COMB] IS NOT NULL
  );

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
),

ccomb_valor AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 [C COMB]
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
      AND [C COMB] IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'C' AS elemento,

CAST(ROUND(
    COALESCE(u.[C COMB], c.[C COMB])
,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor,

CASE
 WHEN COALESCE(u.[C COMB], c.[C COMB]) BETWEEN u.C_MIN AND u.C_MAX THEN 'OK'

 WHEN COALESCE(u.[C COMB], c.[C COMB]) 
      BETWEEN u.C_MIN - ((u.C_MAX-u.C_MIN)*0.1)
          AND u.C_MAX + ((u.C_MAX-u.C_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'

 ELSE 'FORA'
END AS status

FROM ultima u
CROSS JOIN ccomb_valor c

WITH ultima AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
),

ccomb_valor AS (
    SELECT TOP 1 [C COMB]
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
      AND [C COMB] IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT 
'C' AS elemento,

CAST(ROUND(
    COALESCE(u.[C COMB], c.[C COMB])
,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor,

CASE
 WHEN COALESCE(u.[C COMB], c.[C COMB]) BETWEEN u.C_MIN AND u.C_MAX THEN 'OK'

 WHEN COALESCE(u.[C COMB], c.[C COMB]) 
      BETWEEN u.C_MIN - ((u.C_MAX-u.C_MIN)*0.1)
          AND u.C_MAX + ((u.C_MAX-u.C_MIN)*0.1)
 THEN 'LIMITE'

 ELSE 'FORA'
END AS status

FROM ultima u
CROSS JOIN ccomb_valor c

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Mg, Mg_MIN, Mg_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Mg IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        Mg AS mg_base,
        ((Mg_MIN + Mg_MAX) / 2.0) AS mg_alvo
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        (
            ((mg_alvo - mg_base) * 1000.0)
            / (8.0 * 0.8)
        ) / 100.0 AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.15 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0
    END AS ajuste_kg
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Si, Si_MIN, Si_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Si IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        Si AS si_base,
        ((Si_MIN + Si_MAX) / 2.0) AS si_alvo
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        (
            ((si_alvo - si_base) * 1000.0)
            / (75.0 * 70.0)
        ) AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN delta <= 0 THEN 0  -- não corrige para baixo
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.15 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0
    END AS ajuste_kg
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        CUEQ, CUEQ_MIN, CUEQ_MAX, MATERIAL
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        CUEQ IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        CUEQ AS cueq_base,
        ((CUEQ_MIN + CUEQ_MAX) / 2.0) AS cueq_alvo,
        MATERIAL
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        MATERIAL,
        CASE 
            WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN NULL
            ELSE (
                ((cueq_alvo - cueq_base) * 1000.0)
                / 95.0
            )
        END AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    -- 🔧 Quantidade (kg)
    CASE 
        WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN 'FERRÍTICO'
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN '0'
        ELSE CAST(ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0 AS VARCHAR)
    END AS delta_kg,

    -- 🎯 Ação
    CASE 
        WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN 'FERRÍTICO'
        WHEN delta <= 0 THEN 'MANTER'
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN 'MANTER'
        ELSE 'ADICIONAR'
    END AS acao

FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Mg, Mg_MIN, Mg_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Mg IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        Mg AS mg_base,
        ((Mg_MIN + Mg_MAX) / 2.0) AS mg_alvo
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        (
            ((mg_alvo - mg_base) * 1000.0)
            / (8.0 * 0.8)
        ) / 100.0 AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.15 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0
    END AS ajuste_kg
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1

calc AS (

delta_calc AS (

        ) AS delta

SELECT

        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.15 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0
    END AS ajuste_kg
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        CUEQ, CUEQ_MIN, CUEQ_MAX, MATERIAL
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        CUEQ IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC

calc AS (

        CUEQ AS cueq_base,

        END AS delta
    FROM calc

SELECT
    -- 🔧 Quantidade (kg)
    CASE

        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN '0'
        ELSE CAST(ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0 AS VARCHAR)
    END AS delta_kg,

    -- 🎯 Ação
    CASE 
        WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN 'FERRÍTICO'
        WHEN delta <= 0 THEN 'MANTER'
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN 'MANTER'
        ELSE 'ADICIONAR'
    END AS acao

FROM delta_calc;

WITH ultimas AS
(
    SELECT TOP 10
        DATA_HORA,
        CAST(PANELA AS varchar(10))        AS panela,
        CAST(ROUND(Mg,3) AS decimal(10,3)) AS value
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
      AND Mg IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT
    value,                                  -- Mg primeiro (valor do gráfico)
    panela,                                 -- legenda
    CONVERT(varchar(5), DATA_HORA,108) AS hora
FROM ultimas
ORDER BY DATA_HORA ASC;                     -- AQUI está o segredo

WITH ultimas AS
(
    SELECT TOP 10
        DATA_HORA,
        CAST(PANELA AS varchar(10))        AS panela,
        CAST(ROUND(Mg,3) AS decimal(10,3)) AS value
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
      AND Mg IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT
    value,                                  -- Mg primeiro (valor do gráfico)
    panela,                                 -- legenda
    CONVERT(varchar(5), DATA_HORA,108) AS hora
FROM ultimas
ORDER BY DATA_HORA ASC;                     -- AQUI está o segredo

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Mg, Mg_MIN, Mg_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Mg IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        Mg AS mg_base,
        ((Mg_MIN + Mg_MAX) / 2.0) AS mg_alvo
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        (
            ((mg_alvo - mg_base) * 1000.0)
            / (8.0 * 0.8)
        ) / 100.0 AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.15 THEN 'MANTER'
        WHEN delta > 0 THEN 'ADICIONAR'
        ELSE 'REDUZIR'
    END AS acao
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Si, Si_MIN, Si_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Si IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        Si AS si_base,
        ((Si_MIN + Si_MAX) / 2.0) AS si_alvo
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        (
            ((si_alvo - si_base) * 1000.0)
            / (75.0 * 70.0)
        ) AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN 'MANTER'
        WHEN delta > 0 THEN 'ADICIONAR'
        ELSE 'MANTER'   -- não existe redução prática
    END AS acao
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        CUEQ, CUEQ_MIN, CUEQ_MAX, MATERIAL
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        CUEQ IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        CUEQ AS cueq_base,
        ((CUEQ_MIN + CUEQ_MAX) / 2.0) AS cueq_alvo,
        MATERIAL
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        MATERIAL,
        CASE 
            WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN NULL
            ELSE ((cueq_alvo - cueq_base) * 1000.0) / 95.0
        END AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    -- 🔧 Quantidade
    CASE 
        WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN 'FERRÍTICO'
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN '0'
        ELSE CAST(ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0 AS VARCHAR)
    END AS delta_kg,

    -- 🎯 Ação CORRIGIDA
    CASE 
        WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN 'FERRÍTICO'
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN 'MANTER'
        WHEN delta > 0 THEN 'ADICIONAR'
        WHEN delta < 0 THEN 'REDUZIR'
    END AS acao

FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Mg, Mg_MIN, Mg_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Mg IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (
    SELECT
        Mg AS mg_base,
        ((Mg_MIN + Mg_MAX) / 2.0) AS mg_alvo
    FROM base
),

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        (
            ((mg_alvo - mg_base) * 1000.0)
            / (8.0 * 0.8)
        ) / 100.0 AS delta
    FROM calc
)

SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.15 THEN 'MANTER'
        WHEN delta > 0 THEN 'ADICIONAR'
        ELSE 'REDUZIR'
    END AS acao
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        Si, Si_MIN, Si_MAX
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE 
        Si IS NOT NULL
        AND MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
    ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_DATA DESC
),

calc AS (

delta_calc AS (

SELECT

        ELSE 'MANTER'   -- não existe redução prática
    END AS acao
FROM delta_calc;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT TOP 1
        CUEQ, CUEQ_MIN, CUEQ_MAX, MATERIAL

    WHERE

calc AS (
    SELECT
        CUEQ AS cueq_base,

delta_calc AS (
    SELECT
        MATERIAL,

        END AS delta

SELECT
    -- 🔧 Quantidade
    CASE 
        WHEN MATERIAL IN ('FFB30', 'FFB30 ESP') THEN 'FERRÍTICO'
        WHEN ABS(delta) < 0.2 THEN '0'
        ELSE CAST(ROUND(delta * 10, 0) / 10.0 AS VARCHAR)
    END AS delta_kg,

    -- 🎯 Ação CORRIGIDA

options.content: Cueq (Cobre Equivalente)
Si (Silício)
Cueq (Cobre Equivalente)
Si (Silício)

targets.rawSql:
WITH ultimas AS (
    SELECT
        SEQUENCIA_ID,
        CAST(Cueq AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS valor,
        Cueq_min,
        Cueq_max,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
      AND Cueq IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID ASC) AS eixo_x,
    Cueq_max AS UCL,
    Cueq_min AS LCL,
    Cueq_min + ((Cueq_max - Cueq_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_INF,
    Cueq_max - ((Cueq_max - Cueq_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_SUP,
    CAST(ROUND(valor,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor
FROM ultimas
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY eixo_x;

WITH ultimas AS (
    SELECT
        SEQUENCIA_ID,
        CAST(Si AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS valor,
        Si_min,
        Si_max,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
      AND Si IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID ASC) AS eixo_x,
    Si_max AS UCL,
    Si_min AS LCL,
    Si_min + ((Si_max - Si_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_INF,
    Si_max - ((Si_max - Si_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_SUP,
    CAST(ROUND(valor,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor
FROM ultimas
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY eixo_x;

WITH ultimas AS (
    SELECT
        SEQUENCIA_ID,
        CAST(Cueq AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS valor,
        Cueq_min,
        Cueq_max,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
      AND Cueq IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID ASC) AS eixo_x,
    Cueq_max AS UCL,
    Cueq_min AS LCL,
    Cueq_min + ((Cueq_max - Cueq_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_INF,
    Cueq_max - ((Cueq_max - Cueq_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_SUP,
    CAST(ROUND(valor,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor
FROM ultimas
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY eixo_x;

WITH ultimas AS (
    SELECT
        SEQUENCIA_ID,
        CAST(Si AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS valor,
        Si_min,
        Si_max,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID DESC) AS rn
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'BMD'
      AND Si IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SEQUENCIA_ID ASC) AS eixo_x,
    Si_max AS UCL,
    Si_min AS LCL,
    Si_min + ((Si_max - Si_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_INF,
    Si_max - ((Si_max - Si_min) / 6.0) AS ALERTA_SUP,
    CAST(ROUND(valor,3) AS DECIMAL(10,3)) AS valor
FROM ultimas
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY eixo_x;

WITH ultimas AS
(
    SELECT TOP 10
        DATA_HORA,
        CAST(PANELA AS varchar(10))        AS panela,
        CAST(ROUND(Cueq,3) AS decimal(10,3)) AS value
    FROM dbo.bi_espectro
    WHERE MAQUINA_FORNADA = 'DISA'
      AND Cueq IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY DATA_HORA DESC
)

SELECT
    value,                                  -- Mg primeiro (valor do gráfico)
    panela,                                 -- legenda
    CONVERT(varchar(5), DATA_HORA,108) AS hora
FROM ultimas
ORDER BY DATA_HORA ASC;                     -- AQUI está o segredo

(
